creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
garga       2008-10-03 20:14:37 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/py-ipaddr      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  A Google open source IPv4/IPv6 manipulation library in Python.
  This library is used to create/poke/manipulate IPv4 and
  IPv6 addresses and prefixes.
  Development mailing list:
  http://groups.google.com/group/ipaddr-py-dev
  
  WWW:    http://code.google.com/p/ipaddr-py/
  
  PR:             ports/127830
  Submitted by:   Murilo Opsfelder <mopsfelder at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3203    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +25 -0     ports/devel/py-ipaddr/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/py-ipaddr/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/devel/py-ipaddr/pkg-descr (new)
